2603.07546.title: COOL-MC: Verifying and Explaining RL Policies for Multi-bridge Network Maintenance
2603.07546.paper_summary: Aging bridge networks require proactive, verifiable, and interpretable maintenance strategies, yet reinforcement learning (RL) policies trained solely on reward signals provide no formal safety guarantees and remain opaque to infrastructure managers. We demonstrate COOL-MC as a tool for verifying and explaining RL policies for multi-bridge network maintenance, building on a single-bridge Markov decision process (MDP) from the literature and extending it to a parallel network of three heterogeneous bridges with a shared periodic budget constraint, encoded in the PRISM modeling language. We train an RL agent on this MDP and apply probabilistic model checking and explainability methods to the induced discrete-time Markov chain (DTMC) that arises from the interaction between the learned policy and the underlying MDP. Probabilistic model checking reveals that the trained policy has a safety-violation probability of 3.5\% over the planning horizon, being slightly above the theoretical minimum of 0\% and indicating the suboptimality of the learned policy, noting that these results are based on artificially constructed transition probabilities and deterioration rates rather than real-world data, so absolute performance figures should be interpreted with caution. The explainability analysis further reveals, for instance, a systematic bias in the trained policy toward the state of bridge 1 over the remaining bridges in the network. These results demonstrate COOL-MC's ability to provide formal, interpretable, and practical analysis of RL maintenance policies.
2603.07546.paper_summary_zh: 老化的橋樑網絡需要主動、可驗證和可解釋的維護策略，然而僅基於獎勵信號訓練的強化學習 (RL) 策略並未提供正式的安全保證，且對基礎設施管理者來說仍然不透明。我們展示了 COOL-MC 作為一個工具，用於驗證和解釋多橋樑網絡維護的 RL 策略，基於文獻中的單橋馬可夫決策過程 (MDP)，並將其擴展到一個由三座異質橋樑組成的平行網絡，這些橋樑共享一個定期預算約束，並用 PRISM 建模語言編碼。我們在這個 MDP 上訓練了一個 RL 代理，並將概率模型檢查和可解釋性方法應用於由學習到的策略與基礎 MDP 之間的互動所產生的離散時間馬可夫鏈 (DTMC)。概率模型檢查顯示，訓練的策略在規劃範圍內的安全違規概率為 3.5\%，略高於理論最低的 0\%，並表明學習到的策略的次優性，並指出這些結果是基於人工構建的轉移概率和惡化率，而非真實世界數據，因此絕對性能數字應謹慎解釋。可解釋性分析進一步揭示，例如，訓練的策略對橋樑 1 的狀態存在系統性偏見，超過了網絡中其餘橋樑的狀態。這些結果展示了 COOL-MC 提供正式、可解釋和實用的 RL 維護策略分析的能力。
2603.07546.author: Dennis Gross et.al.
